case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. THOMAS WILKINSON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
